name: Erika Slezak's Fettucini with Parmesan, Chicken & Peas
recipeIngredient: 1 cup low fat milk, cream, or half and half
freshly ground black pepper to taste
15 ounce can peas, or frozen package
1 pound fettucini noodles, cooked al dente
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken in an ovenproof dish and add 1/2 cup chicken broth. Bake at 350°F for about 10 minutes on each side, or until chicken is slightly pink.
2. Reserve the chicken broth and cut the breasts across the grain into medium-size slices. Let cool.
3. In a saucepan, melt butter, add flour and stir. With a whisk, gradually add milk, cream, or half and half. Stir in 1 cup of chicken broth and then add the reserved broth from the cooked chicken.
4. Add Parmesan cheese, garlic powder, salt, pepper, peas, and chicken to the saucepan. Simmer until the chicken is cooked through.
5. Pour the sauce over the fettucini. Serve immediately.
